title: melicope rubra
intro: Melicope rubra, also known as the Australian orange peppermint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Melicope rubra include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Melicope rubra can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
